Shop for a Cause

A tangible way to give hope.

Help support our cause and improve health outcomes by giving to these critical areas. Every purchase and donation goes directly to programs in Mexico, the Philippines, and Uganda.

▲

Featured

Shop for a Cause: Give Hope

$40

This t-shirt is everything you've dreamed of and more. It feels soft and lightweight, with the right amount of stretch. It's comfortable and flattering for all. Made on demand to reduce overproduction.

100% combed and ring-spun cotton · Pre-shrunk · Side-seamed · Shoulder-to-shoulder taping
Buy now

Give directly

Choose where your donation goes. Every dollar funds programs on the ground.

▲
Bed Nets for Uganda
Malaria continues to be the leading cause of illness and death in Uganda. Make a global impact by purchasing bed nets and supplies to save lives.
Starting at $15
▲
HIV/AIDS Test Kits
HIV/AIDS in the Philippines has increased by over 400% in the last 10 years! This is especially impacting vulnerable children and youth. Donate here to help improve access to care.
Starting at $25
▲
Youth Internship Enrollment
Our International Youth Internship Program trains students in health, education, leadership, and college preparation. The curriculum and monthly meetings are specifically designed for at-risk youth.
Starting at $50
▲
Hygiene Kits
Proper hygiene and handwashing prevents common and life-threatening illnesses. Support our efforts to prevent disease by providing hygiene kits to youth in global communities.
Starting at $10
▲
Health Education Materials
Help us provide resources and training materials for community leaders around the world as we train trainers! Basic items such as computers, printers, posters, and projectors are valuable tools for underresourced communities.
Starting at $50

Merch

Wear the mission. Every purchase supports our programs.
